scripts.convex:init: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex init
scripts.convex:env:list:dev: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex env list
scripts.convex:env:list:prod: APP_ENV=production vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex env list --prod
scripts.dev:convex: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex dev
scripts.dev:convex:once: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex dev --once
scripts.build:auth: vp exec varlock run -- vp run '@robelest/samlify#build' && vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex codegen --component-dir ./packages/auth/src/component && vp exec varlock run -- vp run '@robelest/convex-auth#build'
scripts.typecheck: vp run '@robelest/convex-auth#typecheck' && vp exec tsc --project tests/tsconfig.vitest.json --noEmit
scripts.deploy:docs: vp run --filter docs build && vpx wrangler pages deploy ./docs/build --project-name=convex-auth
scripts.codegen:convex: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex codegen && vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex codegen --component-dir ./packages/auth/src/component
scripts.codegen:convex:component: vp exec varlock run -- vp exec convex codegen --component-dir ./packages/auth/src/component
